title: A flexible workplace desk system and method for operating such a sytem
abstract: A flexible workplace desk system, comprising a desk (1) for a sitting work position height and a standing work position height. The system comprises a server (10) storing therein multiple pre-set heights specific for each user of the desk. An electronic controller (20) is mounted on the desk. A user is paired to the desk upon identification of the user through near field wireless communication. The electronic controller (20) is configured to communicate to the server (10) the desk occupancy status as well as the activation and inactivation of the do-not-disturb status by the user of the desk.
claims:
Claims C L A I M S 1. A flexible workplace desk system, comprising: a desk (1), the desk comprising: a desk surface (2), a height adjustable frame (3,4,5) supporting the desk surface, an electric motor (M) driven height adjustment actuator configured to raise and lower the desk surface (2) so as to adjust at least a height thereof within a height adjustment range, said range at least include a sitting work position height and a standing work position height, a server (10) storing therein multiple pre-set heights specific for each user of the desk, said pre-set heights at least comprising a sitting work position height and a standing work position height, an electronic controller (20) mounted on said desk, said electronic controller comprising: a near field wireless communication circuit (21) having a near field communication range, said near field wireless communication circuit being configured to communicate with a near field communication enabled portable device (30) belonging to a user of the desk, a network communication circuit (22), preferably a wireless network communication circuit (22), that is configured to communicate with the server (10) via a network, preferably a wireless network (15), said electronic controller (20) being connected to the electric motor (M) of the electric motor driven height adjustment actuator and controlling the electric motor in order to raise and lower the desk surface, wherein said system is configured to pair a specific user to the desk (1) upon identification of the user through the near field wireless communication with the near field communication enabled portable device (30) belonging to a user, and wherein said server (10) is configured to provide to the electronic controller (20), for said specific user paired to the desk, the multiple pre-set heights, said pre-set heights at least comprising a sitting work position height and a standing work position height of the user, 

 a desk mounted signalling assembly (40) mounted on the desk and configured to signal at least: a do-not-disturb status, a desk occupancy status, wherein the desk mounted signalling assembly (40) is connected to the electronic controller (20), a manually actuable user selector and input device (50), mounted on said desk and configured to: allow the user paired to the desk to select one of said pre-set sitting work position height and said pre-set standing work position height, allow the user paired to the desk user to activate and inactivate the do-not-disturb status of the desk mounted signalling assembly, wherein said user selector and input device (50) is connected to said electronic controller (20), and wherein the electronic controller (20) is configured to communicate to the desk mounted signalling assembly (40) the desk occupancy status on the basis of the user being paired to the desk (1), and wherein the electronic controller (20) is configured to communicate to the desk mounted signalling assembly (40) the activation and inactivation of the do-not-disturb status by the user of the desk (1), and wherein the electronic controller (20) is configured to communicate to the server (10) the desk occupancy status as well as the activation and inactivation of the do-not-disturb status by the user of the desk (1). 2. Desk system according to claim 1 , wherein the system is configured to display the do- not-disturb status of a user stored in the server (10) to another user having access to the server, e.g. via a wireless personal device (35) belonging to the other user, e.g. a smart phone communicating with said network. 3. Desk system according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the system further comprises a user presence detection device (60), preferably mounted on the desk (1), wherein the user presence detection device is configured to sense the proximity of a user to the desk, and 

 wherein the user presence detection device is connected to the electronic controller, and wherein the electronic controller is configured to communicate to the server the presence of a user. 4. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 3, wherein the server (10) is adapted to cancel the pairing of the user to the desk and to inactivate the desk-is-occupied status as well as the do-not-disturb status upon output of a routine that involves detection of the user leaving the desk by means of the user presence detection device and/or one or more of: detection of the user leaving the room, floor, or building wherein the desk is located, an entry in an electronic agenda wherein the user is remote from the desk, etc. 5. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 4, wherein the desk system further comprises a second signalling assembly (70) configured to be mounted on a location remote from the desk mounted signalling assembly and connected to the electronic controller, preferably the second signalling assembly being connected to the electronic controller via a cable, wherein the second signalling assembly is configured to signal at least: - a do-not-disturb status, - a desk-is-occupied status. 6. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 5, wherein the manually actuable user selector and input device (50) is further configured to allow the user to control the electric motor driven height adjustment actuator in order raise and lower the desk surface in any height within said range, e.g. by means of anâup-buttonâ and aâdown-buttonâ. 7. Desk system according to claim 6, wherein the second signalling assembly (70) is configured to be removably mounted on a location remote from the desk mounted signally assembly, e.g. the second signalling assembly comprising a clip. 8. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 7, wherein the desk mounted signalling assembly (40) comprises a housing (41) with a light emitting window (42), as well as lighting arrangement (43,44) configured to selectively provide at least a first and a second coloured light within said housing, said selected first or second coloured light exiting the housing via the light emitting window. 9. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 8, wherein the desk mounted signalling assembly and/or the second signalling assembly each comprises a lighting arrangement (43,44) configured to selectively provide at least a first coloured light and a second coloured 

 light, wherein the first coloured light signals a desk occupancy status, preferably that the desk is free, preferably a green coloured light, and wherein the second coloured light signals the do-not-disturb status, preferably a red coloured light. 10. Desk system according to any of claims 1 - 9, wherein at least the manually actuable user selector and input device (50) and the electronic controller (20) are structurally integrated in a common housing (41). 11. A method for operating a flexible workspace desk system according to one or more of the preceding claims, wherein: - pairing a user to the desk (1) upon identification of the user through the near field wireless communication with the near field communication enabled portable device (30) belonging to the user, - wherein the server (10) provides to the electronic controller (20), for said specific user paired to the desk, the multiple pre-set heights, said pre-set heights at least comprising a sitting work position height and a standing work position height of the user, - wherein the user selects by means of the manually actuable user selector and input device (50), one of said pre-set sitting work position height and said pre-set standing work position height of the user, upon which the electric motor driven height adjustment actuator raises or lowers the desk surface so as to adjust at least the height, - wherein the electronic controller (20) communicates to the desk mounted signalling assembly (40) the desk occupancy status on the basis of the user being paired to the desk, - wherein the user activates the do-not-disturb status of the desk mounted signalling assembly, and wherein the electronic controller communicates to the server (10) the desk occupancy status as well as the activation of the do-not-disturb status by the user of the desk.
